task_description: Phase 41 FEAT-003: Add LLM streaming with tool registry hookup to @quant/quant-live. Includes streaming LLM provider wrapping @quant/ai engine, tool bridge to @quant/agent-runtime TypedToolRegistry, sentence splitter for TTS, and pipeline integration.

verification.summary: typecheck passes with zero errors, all 107 tests pass (17 new). Post-review fixes applied: dangling setTimeout cleared, sentence splitter improved to handle abbreviations/decimals, latency measurement tracks first-token not first-sentence.
